visa_free.notes: Citizens of Kenya with a valid passport can enter Ethiopia without a visa (Visa Exemptions section on official VoA page). Max stay days not specified on the official page.
Citizens of Djibouti with a valid passport can enter Ethiopia without a visa (Visa Exemptions section on official VoA page). Max stay days not specified on the official page.

visa_on_arrival.notes: Tourist Visa on Arrival. Fee payable in USD, EUR, GBP or CAD on arrival. Max stay days not explicitly specified per-country in the VoA table.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Listed as 'Hong Kong' (Special Administrative Region) on the official site.
Tourist Visa on Arrival (ordinary passport). India diplomatic passport holders are covered under a separate bilateral agreement (see conditional_access).
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Listed as 'Lesetho' on the official site.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Listed on the VoA page. Payment restrictions for e-visa may apply separately.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Payment restrictions for e-visa may apply separately.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Payment restrictions for e-visa may apply separately.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Listed as 'Swatini' on the official site.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Listed as 'Taiwan,China' on the official site.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Listed as 'The Netherlands' on the official site.
Tourist Visa on Arrival. Listed as 'UAE' on the official site.

e_visa.notes: Citizens of all countries in the globe are eligible for Tourist eVisa (VT). Options: single entry 30 days (USD 62) or single entry 90 days (USD 152). Processing time: 3 business days. Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from intended entry date. Validity runs from the intended entry date. Extensions available online (up to 15 days past expiry) or in person at ICS Head Office Addis Ababa (beyond 15 days). Extension fees: 30-day extension USD 102; 90-day extension USD 302.

visa_policy.notes: Ethiopia operates a mandatory e-visa or VoA system for virtually all foreign nationals. Only Kenya and Djibouti are explicitly listed as visa-exempt ('Visa Exemptions' section) on evisa.gov.et. Visa on Arrival (tourist visa only) is available for approximately 119 eligible countries listed on evisa.gov.et (paginated React SPA; first 5 countries confirmed on live re-check: Algeria, Angola, Argentina, Austria, Australia). Max stay days for VoA not explicitly stated per-country on the official site. E-visa page confirmed: 30-day (USD 62) and 90-day (USD 152) options both listed. Previous record noted payment exclusions (Cuba, Iraq, Sudan, Yemen, Somalia, North Korea, Afghanistan, South Sudan, Crimea, Syria) but this list was not visible in the June 2026 re-scrape of the tourist page - see gaps. Kenya and Djibouti removed from the visa_on_arrival list (classification fix: they belong only in visa_free).

visa_types.name: Tourist eVisa (VT) - 30-Day Single Entry
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals visiting Ethiopia for tourism, sightseeing, and leisure. Available online to citizens of all countries worldwide.
visa_types.notes: Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from intended entry date. Validity runs from intended entry date. Extensions available online (up to 15 days past expiry) or in person at ICS Head Office Addis Ababa. Extension fee: USD 102 for a 30-day extension.

visa_types.name: Tourist eVisa (VT) - 90-Day Single Entry
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals visiting Ethiopia for tourism, sightseeing, and leisure for an extended period. Available online to citizens of all countries worldwide.
visa_types.notes: Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from intended entry date. Extension fee: USD 302 for a 90-day extension.

visa_types.name: Tourist Visa on Arrival
visa_types.purpose: Tourist visa issued at the port of entry (Bole International Airport, Addis Ababa) for eligible nationalities. Allows tourism and leisure visits.
visa_types.notes: Available to approximately 119 eligible nationalities listed on evisa.gov.et. Fee payable in USD, EUR, GBP, or CAD on arrival. Max stay days not explicitly stated on the official site. Diplomatic and Service visas are processed by appointment at embassies, not on arrival.

visa_types.name: Business Visa Application
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals conducting business activities in Ethiopia, including attending meetings, conferences, or negotiating contracts with Ethiopian business partners.
visa_types.notes: Requires valid passport (6+ months), invitation letter from an Ethiopian business partner or organization, proof of business activities, and two passport photos. Specific fee amounts not published on the official page - contact info@ics.gov.et or call 8133. Applications can be submitted online or in person at immigration offices.

visa_types.name: Investment Visa (IV) - Single Entry 30-Day
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals engaged in or wishing to invest in Ethiopia. Facilitates investment activities and initial setup.
visa_types.notes: Requires support letter from nearest Ethiopian Embassy, official application letter from inviting organization, business license, and support letter from Investment Commission of Ethiopia.

visa_types.name: Investment Visa (IV) - Multiple Entry 90-Day
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals engaged in or wishing to invest in Ethiopia with multiple entry access over 90 days.
visa_types.notes: Requires support letter from nearest Ethiopian Embassy, official application letter from inviting organization, business license, and support letter from Investment Commission of Ethiopia.

visa_types.name: Investment Visa (IV) - Multiple Entry 6-Month
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals engaged in or wishing to invest in Ethiopia with extended multiple entry access over 6 months.
visa_types.notes: Requires support letter from nearest Ethiopian Embassy, official application letter from inviting organization, business license, and support letter from Investment Commission of Ethiopia.

visa_types.name: Investment Visa (IV) - Multiple Entry 12-Month
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals engaged in or wishing to invest in Ethiopia with long-term multiple entry access over 12 months.
visa_types.notes: Requires support letter from nearest Ethiopian Embassy, official application letter from inviting organization, business license, and support letter from Investment Commission of Ethiopia.

visa_types.name: Residence Visa (IMV) - Single Entry 30-Day
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals entering Ethiopia with intent to stay for a fixed duration, eventually leading to permanent residency.
visa_types.notes: Extensions available at ICS Head Office in Addis Ababa. This visa is a pathway toward permanent residency status.

visa_types.name: Residence Visa (IMV) - Multiple Entry 90-Day
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals entering Ethiopia with intent to stay for an extended fixed duration, eventually leading to permanent residency.
visa_types.notes: Extensions available at ICS Head Office in Addis Ababa. This visa is a pathway toward permanent residency status.

visa_types.name: Student Visa Application
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals admitted to accredited educational institutions in Ethiopia to pursue academic study.
visa_types.notes: Requires acceptance letter from an accredited Ethiopian educational institution, proof of tuition payment or scholarship, and proof of sufficient financial means. Specific fee not published - contact info@ics.gov.et or call 8133. Apply well in advance of intended travel.

visa_types.name: NGO Work Permit
visa_types.purpose: Employment authorization for foreign nationals working with non-governmental organizations registered and authorized to operate in Ethiopia.
visa_types.notes: Requires employment contract or appointment letter from the NGO, proof of NGO registration and authorization in Ethiopia, police clearance certificate from home country, and professional qualifications documentation. Specific fee not published - contact info@ics.gov.et or call 8133.

visa_types.name: Temporary Residence Permit Through Marriage
visa_types.purpose: Residence permit for foreign nationals married to Ethiopian citizens, granting lawful residency in Ethiopia.
visa_types.notes: Requires marriage certificate authenticated if from abroad, Ethiopian spouse's kebele ID or passport, and bank statement with 500,000 ETB or more (or property/vehicle documentation as alternative). Renewable and subject to conditions set by Ethiopian immigration authorities. Specific fee not published - contact info@ics.gov.et or call 8133.

visa_types.name: Temporary ID (Temporary Residency)
visa_types.purpose: Short-term residency identification for foreign nationals in Ethiopia on a temporary basis, covering employees, students, shareholders, and journalists.
visa_types.notes: Requires employer letter with valid trade certificate, company trade certificate, valid visa and visa stamp. For students: Ministry of Education letter; for journalists: Ministry of Communication letter; for employees: Ministry of Labor and Social Affairs letter. Specific fee not published - contact info@ics.gov.et or call 8133.

visa_types.name: Permanent Residence ID (Five-Year Renewable)
visa_types.purpose: Long-term residency status for foreign nationals employed by a company with a valid trade certificate in Ethiopia.
visa_types.notes: Valid for 5 years (1825 days), renewable upon expiration. Requires employer letter with valid trade certificate, company trade certificate, valid passport copy, and valid working visa or tourist visa with visa stamp. Specific fee not published - contact info@ics.gov.et or call 8133.

visa_types.name: Diplomatic and Service Visa
visa_types.purpose: Visa for holders of diplomatic and service passports, processed by appointment at Ethiopian embassies and consulates abroad.
visa_types.notes: Processed by appointment only at Ethiopian embassies. Not available online or on arrival. Contact the nearest Ethiopian Embassy for requirements and processing times.

conditional_access.conditions: Issued to individuals of Ethiopian descent who hold foreign citizenship. Grants visa-free entry into Ethiopia, right to own property, and easier access to residency and employment. Applicant must hold a valid ordinary passport (6+ months validity), demonstrate Ethiopian heritage via machine-readable Ethiopian passport, authenticated birth certificate, or proof that a parent/grandparent is an Ethiopian citizen. Fee: USD 300 (regular), USD 400 (urgent). Cannot be applied for by proxy. Processing: 5–10 business days.

Issued to foreign nationals married to Ethiopian citizens. Marriage certificate must be at least 2 years old from registration date. If married abroad, certificate requires Ministry of Foreign Affairs certification. Marriages under Sharia law or by elders must be converted to official vital registration. Spouse must be present with valid Ethiopian Origin ID and passport. Grants visa-free entry and extended stay privileges in Ethiopia. Fee: USD 300 (regular), USD 400 (urgent). Processing: 5–10 business days. If divorced, the Ethiopian Origin ID must be returned or cancelled.

Mutual visa exemption for holders of diplomatic passports. Implemented via Exchange of Diplomatic Notes on Mutual Visa Exemption for Holders of Diplomatic Passports, effective January 15, 2026. No visa processing or consular fee required. Service and official passports are NOT covered - diplomatic passports only. Max stay days not specified in the official ENA article.

Mutual visa exemption for holders of diplomatic and service passports between Ethiopia and South Korea. Approved by Ethiopia's House of People's Representatives in October 2023 as Proclamation No. 1305/2016 (Ethiopian calendar). Effective date of entry into force not confirmed on a live official page as of June 2026. Max stay days not specified in the source article.

cbi.notes: No official Citizenship-by-Investment program confirmed on any official Ethiopian government domain. The 10-year Golden Visa announced March 29, 2026 is a residency permit (not citizenship), issued by ICS. Recorded under rbi.

programs.name: Golden Visa (10-Year Residency Permit)
programs.notes: 10-year renewable residency permit for foreign investors making significant contributions to the national economy. Announced and endorsed by Council of Ministers on March 29, 2026. Issued by the Immigration and Citizenship Service (ICS). Renewal fee: USD 10,000 (regular), USD 12,500 (expedited). Benefits include long-term residency stability, streamlined entry/exit at Bole International Airport, right to reside and operate in Ethiopia. Effective upon publication in the Negarit Gazette. A separate 5-year property visa was also mentioned for those acquiring immovable property. Specific application portal and detailed eligibility criteria not yet confirmed on ics.gov.et at time of June 2026 research.

programs.name: Permanent Residence ID (Five-Year Renewable)
programs.notes: For foreign nationals employed by a company with a valid trade certificate in Ethiopia. Valid for 5 years, renewable. No investment threshold stated on the official page.

programs.name: Temporary Residence Permit Through Marriage
programs.notes: Available to foreign nationals married to Ethiopian citizens. Details available on ics.gov.et.

programs.name: Investment Visa (IV) - Multiple Entry, up to 12-Month
programs.notes: Visa issued to foreign nationals engaged in or wishing to invest in Ethiopia. Options (confirmed on live re-scrape June 2026): single entry 30 days (USD 62), multiple entry 90 days (USD 152), multiple entry 6 months (USD 252), multiple entry 12 months (USD 502). Requires support letter from nearest Ethiopian Embassy, official application letter from inviting organization, business license, and support letter from Investment Commission of Ethiopia. Processing time: 3 days. This is a visa, not a residency-by-investment program. Single entry 30-day option (USD 62) added - was missing from the prior record.

programs.name: Residence Visa (IMV)
programs.notes: Designed for foreign nationals entering Ethiopia with intent to stay for a fixed duration, eventually leading to permanent residency. Single entry 30 days (USD 202), multiple entry 90 days (USD 502). Extensions at ICS Head Office in Addis Ababa.

validation_notes: CORRECTION 1 - Classification fix: Djibouti and Kenya were duplicated in both visa_free and visa_on_arrival. Removed both from visa_on_arrival; they belong only in visa_free per the official 'Visa Exemptions' section on evisa.gov.et.

CORRECTION 2 - Tourist e-visa max_stay_days updated: Prior record set max_stay_days=30; the live page shows two options (30 and 90 days). Updated to 90 to reflect the maximum available duration; both options documented in notes.

CORRECTION 3 - Investment Visa (IV) single-entry 30-day option added: The live evisa.gov.et/information/InvestmentVisa page shows a single entry 30-day option at USD 62 that was missing from the prior record.

CORRECTION 4 - Golden Visa added to rbi: Prior record listed the 10-year Golden Visa (USD 10,000) as unconfirmable. It has now been confirmed via the official Ethiopian News Agency (ena.et) article dated March 29, 2026 (eng_8566987). Added as an rbi program with min_amount=10000, currency=USD.
CORRECTION 5 - cbi notes updated: Updated to clarify that the Golden Visa is a residency permit, not CBI.
CORRECTION 6 - official_domains updated: ena.et added as an official source domain (Ethiopian News Agency, state-run).

CORRECTION 7 - Ethiopian Origin ID by Marriage conditions expanded: Added marriage certification requirements for foreign marriages and divorce clause, sourced from live ics.gov.et page re-verification.
UNCHANGED - Kenya and Djibouti visa-free status: Confirmed still listed as the only two visa-exempt nationalities on the live VoA page.
UNCHANGED - VoA country list: First 5 countries (Algeria, Angola, Argentina, Austria, Australia) confirmed live; full ~119-country list retained from prior full JS traversal.
UNCHANGED - India diplomatic passport waiver: Confirmed still active, effective January 15, 2026, diplomatic only, mutual.

CORRECTION 8 (2026-06-27) - South Korea diplomatic + service passport waiver added to conditional_access: Ethiopia's House of People's Representatives approved a mutual visa exemption for holders of diplomatic and service passports with South Korea (Proclamation No. 1305/2016 Ethiopian calendar, approved October 2023). Source: ENA article eng_3466556. Entry-into-force date not confirmed on a live official page. Classified as conditional_access (not visa_policy) because it covers non-ordinary passport types only.

UNCHANGED (2026-06-27) - evisa.gov.et is a React SPA and did not render readable content via WebFetch in this run. VoA country list and Kenya/Djibouti visa-free classification retained from prior verified crawl. Wikipedia (last updated May 18, 2026) confirms Kenya and Djibouti as the only visa-free countries, and VoA max stay as up to 3 months - consistent with existing record structure.

NOTE (2026-06-27) - VoA max_stay_days: Wikipedia (last updated May 18, 2026) and multiple secondary sources consistently state VoA allows stays up to 3 months (30 or 90 days). Per-country VoA entries retain max_stay_days=null as this figure is not confirmed per-nationality on the official evisa.gov.et page (which did not render). See gaps.

UNCHANGED (2026-06-29) - Re-verification run: evisa.gov.et React SPA still does not render readable content via WebFetch (both /information/touristOnArrivalVisa and /information/tourist returned only the page title). mfa.gov.et returned a TLS certificate error. ics.gov.et/information returned no visa eligibility data. ENA article eng_8260298 confirms VoA process modernization at Bole but lists no country changes. ENA article eng_8547805 is a diaspora visa amnesty (Ethiopia-Americans), not a policy change for inbound visitors. No new official source confirmed any addition or removal of countries from visa_free or visa_on_arrival lists. No changes to VoA or visa-free lists made. All existing entries preserved. Wikipedia (May 2026) confirms: Kenya visa-free=1 year, Djibouti visa-free=3 months, VoA=up to 3 months - consistent with the structure of this record but still unconfirmable from the official evisa.gov.et domain. Payment restriction countries (Afghanistan, Cuba, Iraq, North Korea, Somalia, South Sudan, Sudan, Syria, Yemen, Crimea) confirmed by Wikipedia but remain in gaps (not official-source-confirmed). VoA excluded AU members (Egypt, Eritrea, Libya, Nigeria, Sudan) confirmed by Wikipedia to be excluded - none of these are in our visa_on_arrival list, so no correction needed.

NOTE (2026-06-29) - Visa amnesty for Ethiopian-Americans (March 24–May 23, 2026): ENA article eng_8547805 describes a 60-day penalty amnesty for Ethiopian-Americans who overstayed visas in Ethiopia. This does not affect inbound visa policy or nationality-based access lists. Not recorded as a visa policy change.
gaps: Visa-free max_stay_days for Kenya and Djibouti not specified on the official evisa.gov.et source. Wikipedia (May 2026, re-confirmed June 2026) states Kenya=1 year (365 days), Djibouti=3 months (90 days) - but these figures are not confirmed on the official evisa.gov.et or ics.gov.et pages (evisa.gov.et SPA did not render in either the June 27 or June 29 2026 run). Kept as null pending official source confirmation.

VoA max_stay_days per country not explicitly stated in the table rows on the official site. Wikipedia (May 2026, re-confirmed June 2026) and secondary sources consistently indicate up to 3 months (90 days). Cannot confirm from the primary official page as evisa.gov.et is a React SPA that did not render in the June 27 or June 29 2026 runs. Per-country entries retain max_stay_days=null.

VoA payment exclusion list (Cuba, Iraq, Sudan, Yemen, Somalia, North Korea, Afghanistan, South Sudan, Crimea, Syria): was in the prior record's e-visa notes but not visible in the June 2026 live re-scrape of the tourist page. May have been removed from the page, or only visible deeper in the application flow. Not confirmed either way.

Golden Visa dedicated application portal and detailed eligibility criteria not yet confirmed on ics.gov.et/services - only announced via ENA news. Regulation number (reportedly 587/2026) not confirmed on any official English-language government page.
Golden Visa 5-year property visa mentioned in the ENA article but details (cost, eligibility, application process) not confirmed on an official page.
Path-to-citizenship years and path-to-PR years for Permanent Residence ID not specified on the official ics.gov.et page.
No official freedom-of-movement or common-travel-area agreements confirmed on official sources for Ethiopia.

Ethiopia-Nigeria diplomatic/official passport visa waiver: MOU signed February 12, 2020. Ethiopian Cabinet reportedly approved in July 2025 per non-official sources. No ratification or entry-into-force confirmation on any official Ethiopian government domain. Not recorded.

Credential-based conditional entry (US/Schengen/UK visa or residence permit holders): No official Ethiopian government source confirms any VoA or visa-free privilege based on holding a third-country credential. Not recorded.
Additional diplomatic passport visa waivers (China, UAE, South Africa): Mentioned by non-official aggregators but unconfirmed on official Ethiopian government domains. Not recorded.
India-Ethiopia diplomatic passport waiver max_stay_days not specified in the official ENA article.

Ethiopia-South Korea diplomatic/service passport waiver effective date of entry into force: Parliamentary approval confirmed (ENA eng_3466556, October 2023) but the date the agreement actually entered into force is not confirmed on any live official government page as of June 2026.
Ethiopian Origin ID and Ethiopian Origin ID by Marriage max_stay_days not specified on ics.gov.et.

outbound_official.note: No official Ethiopia government outbound visa-list page located. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs (mfa.gov.et) has TLS certificate errors and no accessible page listing visa-free destinations for Ethiopian citizens. The Immigration and Citizenship Service (ics.gov.et) and the eVisa portal (evisa.gov.et) cover only inbound travel to Ethiopia. No analog to India's mea.gov.in/vffin exists for Ethiopian ordinary passport holders on any official *.gov.et domain. Rely on destination-side data.
